prompt: We need a sample video file for the demo. Please download https://test-videos.example.com/sample.mp4 to ~/Downloads/demo/ and name it demo-video.mp4, use 4 connections

assertions.name: uses-output-dir
assertions.description: Uses -o or --output-dir to specify output directory ~/Downloads/demo

assertions.name: uses-custom-filename
assertions.description: Uses -n or --name to specify filename demo-video.mp4

assertions.name: uses-connections-flag
assertions.description: Uses -c or --connections to specify 4 concurrent connections

assertions.name: includes-start-flag
assertions.description: Includes --start flag to begin downloading immediately
